subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the service of the Kingdom of God! The letter dated October 25th to Jinab-i-Aqa Siyyid Asadu'llah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قائم بخدمت ملکوت الله نامه ای که بتاریخ ۲۵ اکتوبر بجناب آقا سید اسدالله
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @oneness; unity of religion, @study; deepening, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
